sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n111213" key="filokarpofo/ros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φῐλο-καρποφόρος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n111213.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">bearing fruit abundantly,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">θέρος</foreign> ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1582.tlg001:6:42" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.42</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
